title: Monitoring Dashboard Layout
description: Schema readiness for monitoring dashboard layouts, covering widget placement, metric visualization, time range controls, and dashboard configuration.

fields.name: widget_placement_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for widget grid placement and sizing on the dashboard

fields.name: metric_visualization_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for metric visualization types and configuration

fields.name: time_range_control_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for time range selection and refresh interval controls

fields.name: dashboard_config_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for dashboard-level configuration and defaults

fields.name: widget_data_source_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for widget data source bindings and query parameters

safety_notes: Schema readiness only. No real dashboard rendering, no metric data display, no live dashboard interaction. Dashboard remains non-functional.
